system.Text:
__When you are in a bad spot and take action in a fight to avoid danger or overcome an obstacle__, envision your approach and roll. If you are...

  * In pursuit, fleeing, dodging, or taking cover: Roll +edge
  * Remaining stalwart against fear or temptation: Roll +heart
  * Blocking, diverting with force, or taking the hit: Roll +iron
  * Moving into hiding or creating a distraction: Roll +shadow
  * Changing the plan or discovering a clever bypass: Roll +wits

On a __strong hit__, you succeed and are in control. Take +1 momentum.

On a __weak hit__, you avoid the worst of the danger or overcome the obstacle, but not without a cost. Make a suffer move (-1). You stay in a bad spot.

On a __miss__, the situation worsens. You stay in a bad spot and must @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.

Trigger.Text: When you are in a bad spot and take action in a fight to avoid danger or overcome an obstacle...

Options.Text: In pursuit, fleeing, dodging, or taking cover
Remaining stalwart against fear or temptation
Blocking, diverting with force, or taking the hit
Moving into hiding or creating a distraction
Changing the plan or discovering a clver bypass

Strong Hit.Text: On a __strong hit__, you succeed and are in control. Take +1 momentum.

Weak Hit.Text: On a __weak hit__, you avoid the worst of the danger or overcome the obstacle, but not without a cost. Make a suffer move (-1). You stay in a bad spot.

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, the situation worsens. You stay in a bad spot and must @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
